extortion.description:
Originally founded as Integrity Dash, the company specialized in local express custom delivery. Its mission was to provide opportunities for urban youth to develop the skills necessary to make a successful transition to adult independence, stability, and employment. The corporation was immediately successful, but its structure limited its ability to expand. From that worthy foundation, Pace was formed in 1997 and has been delivering customized logistics solutions for its customers ever since. While Pace has grown and evolved, its close ties to local communities and its commitment to providing quality job opportunities have remained constant.

Website: https://www.pace-usa.com/

Revenue : $134.4M

Address: 5951 Greenwood Pkwy, Bessemer, Alabama, 35022, United States

Phone Number: (866) 410-7222
